signals.headline: Trump Announces Two-Week Ceasefire with Iran, Israel Suspends Bombing | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]
signals.raw:
Trump Announces Two-Week Ceasefire with Iran, Israel Suspends Bombing | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

President Donald Trump confirmed a "double-sided ceasefire" with Iran on Tuesday via Truth Social, pausing U.S. strikes for two weeks to advance a long-term peace deal after meeting military objectives; Israel has agreed to suspend its bombing campaign, per White House officials and Reuters.[1][
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A
Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?
